data.chapter_title_en: Invocations for when you meet an adversary or a powerful ruler.
data.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ عَضُدِي، وَأَنْتَ نَصِيرِي، بِكَ أَحُولُ وَبِكَ أَصُولُ، وَبِكَ أُقاتِلُ)).
data.english_text: (O Allah, You are my supporter and You are my helper, by You I move and by You I attack and by You I battle.)
data.transliteration: (Allahumma anta AAadudee, wa-anta naseeree, bika ajoolu wabika asoolu wabika oqatil)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahumma anta AAadudee, wa-anta naseeree, bika ajoolu wabika asoolu wabika oqatil)
